# iotcALB

`iotcALB` supports the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) process for
Indian Ocean albacore tuna (*Thunnus alalunga*), managed by the [Indian
Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC)](https://www.iotc.org).

See the [IOTC Albacore MSE
homepage](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/) and the [Trial
Specifications Document](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/tsd) for
more details on the overall process and technical details respectively.

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("Blue-Matter/iotcALB")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`CondData_OM5a`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/CondData_OM5a.md)
  : MCMC-derived variables for OM5a (SW CPUE reference OM)
- [`CondData_OM5b`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/CondData_OM5b.md)
  : MCMC-derived variables for OM5b (base case reference OM)
- [`CondData_OM6b`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/CondData_OM6b.md)
  : MCMC-derived variables for OM6b (1% effort creep robustness OM)
- [`Cond_BaseCase`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/Cond_BaseCase.md)
  : Base-case operating model conditioning data for Indian Ocean
  Albacore
- [`ImportOM()`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/ImportOM.md)
  : Import an MSEtool OM from IOTC Albacore conditioning output
- [`StockObjectList`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/StockObjectList.md)
  : Albacore operating model stock schedules
- [`ValidateOM()`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/ValidateOM.md)
  : Compare OM reference quantities against the conditioning model
- [`albMSE_Biology`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/albMSE_Biology.md)
  : Raw biological schedules from the albMSE conditioning data
- [`albMSE_Data`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/albMSE_Data.md)
  : MSEtool Data object for IOTC albacore
